ThreadProxyPipe - org.graphstream.stream.thread中的类
Filter that allows to pass graph events between two threads without explicit synchronization.
ThreadProxyPipe() - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.stream.thread.ThreadProxyPipe
 
ThreadProxyPipe(Source) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.stream.thread.ThreadProxyPipe
已过时。
Use the default constructor and then call the ThreadProxyPipe.init(Source) method.
ThreadProxyPipe(Source, boolean) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.stream.thread.ThreadProxyPipe
已过时。
Use the default constructor and then call the ThreadProxyPipe.init(Source) method.
ThreadProxyPipe(Source, Sink, boolean) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.stream.thread.ThreadProxyPipe
已过时。
Use the default constructor and then call the ThreadProxyPipe.init(Source) method.

This class defines a TLP parser.

Constructor with InputStream.

Constructor.
TLPParser(FileSourceTLP, InputStream) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.stream.file.tlp.TLPParser
Create a new parser associated with a TLP source from an input stream.
TLPParser(FileSourceTLP, Reader) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.stream.file.tlp.TLPParser
Create a new parser associated with a DOT source from a reader.

Convert a calendar into a string according to the format of this object.
transform(double, double, double) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.Backend
Transform a point in graph units into pixel units.
transform(Point3) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.Backend
Transform a point in graph units into pixel units, the given point is transformed in place and also returned.
transformGuToPx(double, double, double) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.Camera
Transform a point in graph units into pixels.
transformGuToPx(double, double, double) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.DefaultCamera2D
Transform a point in graph units into pixels.
transformPxToGu(double, double) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.Camera
Return the given point in pixels converted in graph units (GU) using the inverse transformation of the current projection matrix.
transformPxToGu(double, double) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.DefaultCamera2D
Return the given point in pixels converted in graph units (GU) using the inverse transformation of the current projection matrix.
translate(double, double, double) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.Backend
Multiply the to-most matrix by a translation matrix.

RegularExpression Id.
tryReplay(Source, Sink) - 接口中的静态方法 org.graphstream.stream.Replayable
Same as Replayable.replay(Replayable, Sink) but the first parameter is just a Source and it will be replayed only if the Replayable interface is implemented.
TwoK - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.images.Resolutions
 
type - 类中的变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.Selector
The kind of element this matcher applies to.
type - 类中的变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.StyleSheet.NameSpace
The kind of elements in this name space.
type() - 注释类型 中的元素 org.graphstream.stream.AnnotatedSink.Bind
Type of element that triggered the annotated method.
TYPE - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSourceGEXF.GEXFConstants.ATTRIBUTEAttribute
 
TYPE - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSourceGEXF.GEXFConstants.EDGEAttribute
 
TYPE - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSourceGPX.GPXConstants.Balise
 
TYPE - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSourceGraphML.GraphMLConstants.EndPointAttribute
 
TYPE_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
An type-unspecified array.
TYPE_BOOLEAN - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Followed by a byte who's value is 0 or 1
TYPE_BOOLEAN_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
An array of booleans.
TYPE_BYTE - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Followed by a signed byte [-127,127]
TYPE_BYTE_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
An array of bytes.
TYPE_DOUBLE - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Followed by a double precision 64-bits floating point number
TYPE_DOUBLE_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Array of double.
TYPE_FLOAT - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Followed by a single precision 32-bits floating point number
TYPE_FLOAT_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Array of double.
TYPE_INT - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Followed by an 32-bit signed integer
TYPE_INT_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
An array of integers.
TYPE_LONG - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Followed by an 64-bit signed integer
TYPE_LONG_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
An array of longs.
TYPE_NULL - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
 
TYPE_RAW - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Raw data, good for serialization.
TYPE_SHORT - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Followed by an 16-bit signed integer (a short)
TYPE_SHORT_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
An array of shorts.
TYPE_STRING - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Array of characters.
TYPE_STRING_ARRAY - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
Array of Array of characters.
TYPE_UNKNOWN - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamConstants
